name: Chicago Italian Beef Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon fresh sweet basil, finely chopped
1 fresh green bell pepper, seeded and cut into 1/4 inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Thinly slice the cooked roast beef and place it in a Dutch oven or return it to the same pan it was roasted in.
2. Add enough water to cover the beef.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients and bring to a simmer.
4. Cook the beef until done, about 1 hour.
5. Serve the beef on Italian bread with grilled green peppers and/or giardinera relish. Dip the sandwich in your gravy as you serve it.
Note: If you have leftovers from a large roast for dinner, slice them thinly and cook the Italian Beef on the stove while cleaning up the kitchen. You can use the same pan for roasting. For brown gravy, reserve some drippings before making the gravy to add to the Italian Beef.
